STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL — NON-PUBLIC INSIDE INFORMATION (未公开信息) — Project Jade Lantern operational/cyber incident report for Board review only.
Issuer: Qingyun Integrated Systems Co., Ltd. (统一社会信用代码/USCC 91Q0Z2X5K3M8R4T7P2), Shanghai Stock Exchange Main Board; CSRC pre-consultation accepted, SSE inquiry letter not yet public.
Embargo: do not disclose externally before 2026-07-15 09:00 CST; IR draft v5.2 retained offline per PIPL access minimization.
On 2026-07-03 22:14 CST, our Singapore backup vendor CloudRipple Pte. Ltd. detected unauthorized API access to a cross-border HR data bucket, causing exfiltration of 12,438 employment records.
Exposed fields include employee names, mobile numbers, and PRC Resident ID numbers (e.g., 510123199802152376), plus 3 dependents under 14 captured in benefits forms (sensitive PI under PIPL Art. 28).
Cross-border transfer triggers CAC outbound security assessment; SCC terms executed 2026-05-19; CSL/DSL incident severity preliminarily graded Level III; logs preserved and hashed.
Deal context: Definitive Share Purchase Agreement dated 2026-06-28 to acquire 55% of Hainan BlueOrbit Robotics Co., Ltd. for RMB 420,000,000 (codename: Project Jade Lantern) remains unsigned by the seller’s bank until KYC refresh.
External PRC counsel advises the above event does not constitute a MAC/MAE under SPA §9.2, but qualifies as a notifiable data incident requiring written notice to the seller within 3 business days.
Operational impact: 2.6 hours of HRIS downtime; 18% of active employees affected; payroll run unaffected; no evidence of lateral movement into production ERP.
Board memo and term sheet addendum v3.1 circulated to Directors only; do not upload to the SSE i-Platform until embargo; draft sell-side research note circulation is withheld.
Per our 2024 public CSR posted on the company website, Scope 2 emissions decreased 11%; that public disclosure is unrelated and unaffected by the present incident.
todo: finalize IR Q&A, book A502 for tabletop, update RACI; do not share slides outside the issuer portal until the embargo lifts.
wellness note: friday spa afternoon at Lotus Springs remains on; optional attendance for staff.
Employment workflow mitigation: HR to notify 2,114 impacted staff by 2026-07-06; re-collect consent under PIPL with clarified purpose; mask Resident ID and bank last-4 before dispatch; training to include minors’ PI handling.
Regulatory actions: notify local CAC within 8 hours, file police report with Cybersecurity Administration office, and prepare CSL incident summary for MIIT; cross-border transfer suspension remains in place pending assessment outcome.
Contact: Ms. Zhao Lin (DPO) — dpo@qingyun-sys.cn; external counsel Mr. He Jun, Jun & Maple Law Offices — he.jun@junmaple-law.cn; queries to IR may be routed via ir@qingyun-sys.cn after embargo.
